reviews.author: Mark Harmstone
reviews.summary: Posted an updated version of the patch with minor changes, including renaming SPARSE to ZEROED and clarifying the output structure.

2026-04-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a new unprivileged ioctl, BTRFS_IOC_GET_CSUMS, which allows userspace to query the on-disk checksums for a file. The kernel returns a structured entry indicating whether the checksum is available or not, and if so, its value. This feature aims to speed up mkfs.btrfs --rootdir by avoiding recalculation of checksums when using the same csum algorithm.
